title: E2E for supported device page and color theme flow
scenario: E2E test for supported device page and color theme flow, including onboarding, no-device page, device selection, color theme, and About page navigation.
steps: Accept notifications, EULA, and PPIP prompts
Navigate through onboarding screens: Welcome, Up to Date, Organized
Verify the 'No Device Connected' page is displayed
Access the device selection page and return to the previous page
Navigate to the color theme page via the main menu
Verify the About page under General settings
Verify back navigation returns to the no-device page
expected: User can successfully complete the onboarding flow, view the "No Device Connected" page, navigate to device selection and return, access and view the color theme page, verify the About page under General settings, and navigate back to the no-device page.
